title: DepthWeave-KV: Token-Adaptive Cross-Layer Residual Factorization for Long-Context KV Cache
snippet: DepthWeave-KV is a token-adaptive method for compressing key-value caches in long-context LLMs. Unlike prior work using uniform compression, this method factorizes residuals across layers adaptively per token, preserving important information while reducing memory footprint by 3-5x.
